segments.label: hook
segments.narration: Everyone saw the market fall today — but this is the part they missed.

segments.label: what
segments.narration: The Nifty IT index sank about 2.7% — a 3-year low — its third straight down day.

segments.label: why
segments.narration: IT is one of the heaviest-weighted, most export-sensitive sectors in Indian indices — so when it drops, it drags the whole benchmark down.

segments.label: understand
segments.narration: The trigger: fears US rates stay higher for longer, plus worries about AI disrupting IT services. Educational only, not advice.

segments.label: cta
segments.narration: Understand the Indian market better with Maven. trymaven.in

narration: Everyone saw the market fall today — but this is the part they missed. The Nifty IT index sank about 2.7% — a 3-year low — its third straight down day. IT is one of the heaviest-weighted, most export-sensitive sectors in Indian indices — so when it drops, it drags the whole benchmark down. The trigger: fears US rates stay higher for longer, plus worries about AI disrupting IT services. Educational only, not advice. Understand the Indian market better with Maven. trymaven.in
